---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  - id: pubs
    template: ../_ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: ../publications/pubs/*.qmd
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    page-size: 300
    filter-ui: true
    # sort-ui: true
    fields: [image, pub_number, title, journ, categories, author, url_source]

page-layout: full
---

<hr>

:::{#pubs}
:::
